title: phagnalon calycinum subsp. calycinum
intro: Phagnalon calycinum subsp. calycinum, also known as a type of succulent plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Phagnalon calycinum subsp. calycinum include wound healing, relief from pain and inflammation, and immune system support. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
